name: Checkmate
description: Checkmate — WhatsApp/SMS-native misinformation and scam classification API.

seo.title: Checkmate — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Checkmate: Checkmate — WhatsApp/SMS-native misinformation and scam classification API.

when_to_use: Running automated fact-checking and misinformation detection
Integrating claim verification into content publishing workflows
Detecting misleading content before it reaches feed distribution
Building trust signals for fact-checked content at scale

pros: Purpose-built for WhatsApp and SMS misinformation
Useful for fact-check orgs and civic tech
cons: Very narrow use case, not general moderation
Not for toxicity or NSFW detection
review.verdict: Niche but well-fit for messaging misinformation; do not expect a general-purpose moderation stack.
review.best_for: Fact-checkers and NGOs fighting misinformation and scams on WhatsApp or SMS.
review.not_for: General platforms needing toxicity, NSFW, or multimodal content moderation.
